=== RUN   Test_Unit_Stdlib
--- PASS: Test_Unit_Stdlib (<TIMESTAMP>)
=== RUN   TestUnitTestSuite
=== RUN   TestUnitTestSuite/TestUnitSuccess
--- PASS: TestUnitTestSuite (<TIMESTAMP>)
    --- PASS: TestUnitTestSuite/TestUnitSuccess (<TIMESTAMP>)
=== RUN   Test_Unit_Stdlib
--- PASS: Test_Unit_Stdlib (<TIMESTAMP>)
=== RUN   TestUnitTestSuite
=== RUN   TestUnitTestSuite/TestUnitSuccess#01
--- PASS: TestUnitTestSuite (<TIMESTAMP>)
    --- PASS: TestUnitTestSuite/TestUnitSuccess#01 (<TIMESTAMP>)
PASS
ok  	github.com/mvrahden/go-test/examples/stdlib	<TIMESTAMP>
